title: Surgeon Vacancy at Johnson & Johnson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Johnson & Johnson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
